name: rr-toggle
summary: Form-associated switch for binary on/off settings. Pill track and sliding knob; ElementInternals handles form participation.

props.name: checked
props.description: Whether the toggle is on. Reflected to the checked attribute.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the toggle is non-interactive. Reflected to the disabled attribute.

props.name: name
props.description: Form field name used for form submission.

props.name: label
props.description: Label text. Falls back to slotted content when empty.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Label text, used as an alternative to the label property.

events.name: change
events.detail: Fires when the toggle state changes. Bubbles and is composed.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)
The label must be associated with the control via the for/id pairing on the native input.
The focus ring is driven by --color-border-focus on input:focus-visible — never replace it with a bare outline:none.
The native input carries role="switch" so the control is announced as a switch, not a checkbox.

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the switch
rules: A hidden native <input type="checkbox" role="switch"> provides focus, keyboard, and label-click semantics; the visual track and knob are decorative.
Form participation is provided via formAssociated and ElementInternals.setFormValue.
aria-checked reflects the on/off state (true when on, false when off).
The label must convey meaning on its own; do not rely solely on color or knob position.
